prompt: Implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt using Ruby. The executable must be named 'minigit' and be runnable as ./minigit. For compiled languages, include a Makefile or build script. For interpreted languages, ensure the minigit file has a proper shebang line and is executable. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v1.sh
response:
```ruby
#!/usr/bin/env ruby

require 'digest'
require 'fileutils'

def init
  if Dir.exist?('.minigit')
    puts 'Initialized empty minigit repository'
    return
  end
  Dir.mkdir('.minigit')
  Dir.mkdir('.minigit/objects')
  File.write('.minigit/HEAD', 'ref: refs/heads/main')
  puts 'Initialized empty minigit repository'
end

def hash_object(path)
  unless File.exist?(path)
    puts "Could not open file #{path}"
    exit(1)
  end
  content = File.read(path)
  blob = "blob #{content.bytesize}\0#{content}"
  sha = Digest::SHA1.hexdigest(blob)
  File.write(".minigit/objects/#{sha}", blob)
  puts sha
end

def cat_file(sha)
  path = ".minigit/objects/#{sha}"
  unless File.exist?(path)
    puts 'Not a valid object name'
    exit(1)
  end
  blob = File.read(path)
  _, content = blob.split("\0", 2)
  print content
end

def ls_files
  return unless File.exist?('.minigit/index')
  entries = File.binread('.minigit/index').unpack('a40a*').first
  entries.scan(/.{40}/) do |sha|
    puts sha
  end
end

def update_index(path)
  unless File.exist?(path)
    puts "Could not open file #{path}"
    exit(1)
  end
  content = File.read(path)
  blob = "blob #{content.bytesize}\0#{content}"
  sha = Digest::SHA1.hexdigest(blob)
  File.write(".minigit/objects/#{sha}", blob)
  mode = File.stat(path).mode.to_s(8)[-3..-1]
  entry = [sha, mode, path].join("\0") + "\0"
  if File.exist?('.minigit/index')
    existing = File.binread('.minigit/index')
    entries = existing.unpack('a*').first.split("\0\0").map { |e| e.split("\0") }
    entries.reject! { |e| e[2] == path }
    entries << [sha, mode, path]
    new_index = entries.map { |e| e.join("\0") }.join("\0\0") + "\0\0"
    File.binwrite('.minigit/index', new_index)
  else
    File.binwrite('.minigit/index', entry)
  end
end

def write_tree
  return unless File.exist?('.minigit/index')
  entries = File.binread('.minigit/index').unpack('a*').first.split("\0\0").map { |e| e.split("\0") }
  tree_data = entries.map do |sha, mode, name|
    mode = mode.to_i(8)
    "#{mode} #{name}\0#{[sha].pack('H*')}"
  end.join
  tree = "tree #{tree_data.bytesize}\0#{tree_data}"
  sha = Digest::SHA1.hexdigest(tree)
  File.write(".minigit/objects/#{sha}", tree)
  puts sha
end

def commit_tree(tree_sha, message, parent = nil)
  commit_data = "tree #{tree_sha}\n"
  commit_data += "parent #{parent}\n" if parent
  commit_data += "author user <user@example.com> #{Time.now.to_i} +0000\n"
  commit_data += "committer user <user@example.com> #{Time.now.to_i} +0000\n\n"
  commit_data += "#{message}\n"
  commit = "commit #{commit_data.bytesize}\0#{commit_data}"
  sha = Digest::SHA1.hexdigest(commit)
  File.write(".minigit/objects/#{sha}", commit)
  puts sha
end

def update_ref(ref, sha)
  parts = ref.split('/')
  dir = parts[0...-1].join('/')
  Dir.mkdir(".minigit/#{dir}") unless Dir.exist?(".minigit/#{dir}")
  File.write(".minigit/#{ref}", sha)
end

def commit(message)
  unless File.exist?('.minigit/index')
    puts 'Nothing to commit'
    exit(1)
  end
  tree_sha = `#{__FILE__} write-tree`.strip
  head_ref = File.read('.minigit/HEAD').strip.sub('ref: ', '')
  parent_sha = nil
  if File.exist?(".minigit/#{head_ref}")
    parent_sha = File.read(".minigit/#{head_ref}").strip
  end
  commit_sha = commit_tree(tree_sha, message, parent_sha)
  update_ref(head_ref, commit_sha)
  puts "[#{head_ref.split('/').last} #{commit_sha[0..6]}] #{message}"
end

def get_sha(name)
  if name =~ /\A[0-9a-f]{40}\z/
    name
  elsif name =~ /\A[0-9a-f]{4,}\z/
    Dir['.minigit/objects/*'].find { |f| f.split('/').last.start_with?(name) }&.split('/')&.last
  elsif File.exist?(".minigit/refs/heads/#{name}")
    File.read(".minigit/refs/heads/#{name}").strip
  else
    nil
  end
end

def rev_parse(name)
  sha = get_sha(name)
  if sha
    puts sha
  else
    puts "Not a valid object name"
    exit(1)
  end
end

command = ARGV.shift
case command
when 'init'
  init
when 'hash-object'
  hash_object(ARGV.shift)
when 'cat-file'
  cat_file(ARGV.shift)
when 'ls-files'
  ls_files
when 'update-index'
  update_index(ARGV.shift)
when 'write-tree'
  write_tree
when 'commit-tree'
  tree_sha = ARGV.shift
  message = nil
  parent = nil
  while arg = ARGV.shift
    case arg
    when '-m'
      message = ARGV.shift
    when '-p'
      parent = ARGV.shift
    end
  end
  puts commit_tree(tree_sha, message, parent)
when 'update-ref'
  ref = ARGV.shift
  sha = ARGV.shift
  update_ref(ref, sha)
when 'commit'
  message = ARGV.shift
  commit(message)
when 'rev-parse'
  rev_parse(ARGV.shift)
else
  puts 'Unknown command'
  exit(1)
end
```
